aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Harmony Heating & Air Conditioning due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. Their current site lacks the depth and format to stand out in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can improve with more regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Product or Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best HVAC repair in Denver' or 'emergency AC service near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, customer testimonials, and detailed service explanations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Harmony Heating & Air Conditioning the top Denver HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to recognize and cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models cite Harmony as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; delaying action will result in lost market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Harmony Heating & Air Conditioning
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your HVAC leads.
